parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'projects_active', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived')),
  'critical_unresolved', (SELECT count(*) FROM security_events WHERE resolved=false AND severity='critical'),
  'ips_blocked', (SELECT count(*) FROM ip_blocklist WHERE blocked_until > now()),
  'consultations_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM consultation_queue WHERE status='pending'),
  'aftercare_urgent', (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled') AND severity IN ('high','critical')),
  'errors_24h', (SELECT count(*) FROM activity_log WHERE action='workflow_error' AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),
  'llm_cost_30d', COALESCE(round((SELECT sum(cost_usd) FROM llm_calls WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days')::numeric, 2), 0),
  'last_pen_test', (SELECT to_char(max(occurred_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM security_events WHERE event_type='pen_test_finding')
) AS stats;
